case_title: LAM, CHONG et al vs. DWORKIN, EARL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, CHONG TANG, HENRY TANG, THU HONG AS TO DEFENDANT DWORKIN, EARL DOES 1 TO 40 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-01-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-11-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-01-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-01-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-31-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-31-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-31-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-27-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-31-1996 TO DEC-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE - CONTINUED FROM 12/2/96: $150.00 PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED SANCTIONS ARE DUE AND PAYABLE FORTHWITH. HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1997, DISMISSAL DISMISSED W/O PREJ. PER CRC 525.
ORDER DENYING EXPARTE APPLN TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL FILED FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN; PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR ON 10/1 96; 10/21/96; 12/2/96; 1/6/97 & TO REMIT SANCTIONS.
ORDER DENYING EXPARTE APPLN TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL FILED APPLN PREVIOUSLY DENIED, SEE 7/1/97 ORDER.
